metadata.title: Oboya Horticulture | Integrated Horticulture Solutions
metadata.description: Your one-stop partner for horticulture. Integrated solutions from propagation and planting to packaging and retail display — serving growers worldwide.

nav.solutionsVegetablesDesc: Propagation, growing systems, and packaging for vegetable production.
nav.solutionsFlowersDesc: Complete solutions for floriculture and ornamental growers.
nav.solutionsFruitsDesc: Specialized systems for berry and fruit cultivation.
nav.productsGrowingMediaDesc: Substrates and soil solutions for optimal plant health.

hero.title: Your one-stop partner for horticulture
hero.description: Integrated solutions from propagation and planting to packaging and retail display — trusted by growers in 80+ countries worldwide.

catalogue.title: Oboya Horticulture Catalogue 2024
catalogue.description: Browse our full product catalogue page by page. Use the navigation controls or arrow keys to move between pages.
catalogue.error: Unable to load the catalogue. Please try again later.

companyOverview.headlineGreen: We support the entire horticultural supply chain
companyOverview.headlineWhite: from propagation and planting to packaging and retail display.
companyOverview.imageAlt: Workers in a modern greenhouse facility

globalPresence.title: We operate in 25 countries, with production hubs in Asia, South America and Europe, as well as local support teams worldwide.
globalPresence.mapAlt: Interactive Oboya global presence map with offices, factories and warehouses across 25 countries worldwide

featuredProducts.title: Integrated horticulture solutions designed for efficiency, quality, and sustainability across the entire supply chain.

solutions.title: End-to-end systems for modern horticulture
solutions.description: Every solution is engineered to integrate seamlessly — from the greenhouse floor to the retail display.
solutions.propagationDesc: Substrates, trays, and climate-controlled systems for healthy plant establishment.
solutions.packagingDesc: Retail-ready packaging and supply chain solutions that preserve freshness from farm to shelf.
solutions.sustainableDesc: Eco-conscious materials and processes that reduce environmental impact without compromising quality.
solutions.distributionDesc: Global logistics infrastructure ensuring reliable delivery to production sites worldwide.
solutions.circularDesc: Recyclable packaging and waste-reduction programs aligned with industry certifications.

industries.title: Serving every segment of modern horticulture
industries.description: Tailored expertise for the environments and crops that define your operation.
industries.greenhousesDesc: Scalable systems for large-scale protected cultivation.
industries.nurseriesDesc: Precision tools for young plant production and rooting.
industries.retailDesc: Packaging and logistics that preserve quality to the shelf.
industries.berriesDesc: Specialized solutions for high-value berry operations.

innovation.title: Pioneering technology and sustainable practices that shape the future of horticulture
innovation.description: From advanced greenhouse systems to circular packaging solutions, we invest continuously in R&D to help growers meet tomorrow's challenges.
innovation.news1Title: Next-generation greenhouse technology for sustainable production
innovation.news2Title: Expanding our footprint in Asia-Pacific markets

sustainability.title: Growing responsibly for future generations
sustainability.description: Sustainability is embedded in every solution we deliver — from substrate composition to packaging design and global logistics.
sustainability.sourcingDesc: Certified materials and ethical supply chains across all operations.
sustainability.packagingDesc: Recyclable and reusable solutions that reduce environmental footprint.
sustainability.waterDesc: Systems designed to optimize irrigation and reduce resource waste.
sustainability.carbonDesc: Commitment to lowering emissions across production and logistics.

news.title: Latest insights from Oboya
news.description: Industry updates, company news, and horticulture trends.
news.item1Title: Next-generation greenhouse technology for sustainable production
news.item2Title: Expanding our footprint in Asia-Pacific markets

cta.title: Ready to transform your horticulture operations?
cta.description: Connect with our global team to discover integrated solutions tailored to your production needs.
